name: ADHD
description: Layout feels like chasing thoughts across a busy room. Visual noise, unclear pacing, and overlapping stimuli demand executive function at every scroll. Simplicity becomes permission to stay.

checks.message: Auto‑advancing carousels split attention. Provide play/pause and let users control motion.
checks.technical: Avoid autoplay. Use prefers-reduced-motion and provide manual controls.

checks.message: Moving text increases cognitive load. Prefer static text with clear hierarchy.
checks.technical: Remove marquee. Use headings, spacing, and lists for structure.

checks.message: Stacked modals and popups create context switching. Reduce interruptions.
checks.technical: Avoid nested modals. Ensure focus trapping and Escape to close.
